query: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS home_module_items (id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY, module_key VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL, experience_id INT NOT NULL, sort_order INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, created_at BIGINT NOT NULL, UNIQUE KEY uq_module_experience (module_key, experience_id));
